name: edupro-classroom
description: EduPro WebRTC Classroom Screen Sharing — Offline, 1 board → 40 tablets

scripts.build: npx esbuild src/board-client.js --bundle --platform=browser --outfile=public/board-client.js --define:process.env.NODE_ENV=\"production\" && npx esbuild src/tablet-client.js --bundle --platform=browser --outfile=public/tablet-client.js --define:process.env.NODE_ENV=\"production\"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build && npm run certs
